# llms.txt — i'm solutions (imSolutions Studio)
# https://imsolutions.studio/llms.txt
# Last update: 2026-05-14

> i'm solutions (also "im solutions", "imSolutions Studio") is a digital product studio founded in Spain by Ivelina Savchova and Mario Villanueva. We build meaningful digital solutions focused on real-world problems. Our flagship product is Kleia, a clinical nutrition planning platform for independent nutritionists.

## Company

- Name: i'm solutions
- Alternate names: im solutions, imSolutions Studio
- Founders: Ivelina Savchova, Mario Villanueva
- Location: Spain (operating in ES, EU, LATAM)
- Languages: Spanish (es), English (en), Bulgarian (bg)
- Contact: hello@imsolutions.studio
- Website: https://imsolutions.studio/
- Status: Active — currently developing Kleia

## Mission

We design and develop digital products that solve real problems with simplicity, purpose, and a human touch. We believe the real product is not just the software — it's the synergy between people who believe in long-term value.

## Pages

- [Home](https://imsolutions.studio/): Hero, projects, about, contact (one-page with anchors).
- [Projects](https://imsolutions.studio/#projects): Currently featuring Kleia.
- [About](https://imsolutions.studio/#about): Story of Ivelina and Mario, mission and philosophy.
- [Contact](https://imsolutions.studio/#contact): Contact form (EmailJS), email, location.
- [Kleia](https://imsolutions.studio/kleia): Clinical nutrition planning platform — landing page.
- [Legal](https://imsolutions.studio/legal): Terms and conditions (ES / EN / BG).

## Projects

### Kleia
- URL: https://imsolutions.studio/kleia
- Category: Clinical nutrition planning platform / SaaS for nutritionists
- Status: Closed pilot — Founder Plan with limited spots
- Audience: Independent nutritionists, dietitians and licensed health professionals
- Value proposition: Generate clinical nutrition plans in minutes, with automatic macro recalculation, smart substitutions, shopping lists, and one-click PDF / WhatsApp delivery — without losing professional judgment.
- Pricing: Founder Plan (limited spots), 14-day free trial, no commitment.
- See dedicated llms file: https://imsolutions.studio/llms-kleia.txt

## Licensing & usage

Content allowed for informational use by LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Perplexity, Meta, Apple, etc.) with source attribution to https://imsolutions.studio. Do not invent details outside what is stated in this file or our public website.

## Crawl

- Recommended rate: ~1 request/second
- Excluded: /admin, /login
- Sitemap: https://imsolutions.studio/sitemap.xml
